reviews.comment:

All the staff are very friendly. The service is excellent. I've been taking my car there for over 10 years. Impeccable.

reviews.comment:
Buenas atención, hay cola por el precio conveniente en combustible, los lunes más, ya que están los beneficios YPF SERVICLUB.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, there's a queue for the convenient fuel price, even longer on Mondays, because of the YPF SERVICLUB benefits.

reviews.comment:
Mala atención , hace meses que no reparan el compresor para el aire de los neumáticos , muchas veces te roban el descuento por socio del ACÁ, si vas en horario de cambio de turno podés demorar hasta 1 hora porque los que se van quieren salir antes y no atienden y los que tienen que entrar tampoco atienden

(Translated by Google)
Poor service; they haven't repaired the tire inflator compressor in months. They often steal your ACA member discount. If you go during shift change, you can expect to wait up to an hour because the outgoing staff want to leave early and don't attend to customers, and the incoming staff don't attend to customers either.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos lo sucedido, gracias a tu comentario podemos mejorar nuestro servicio. Te esperamos para revertir lo sucedido. Saludos
